banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MARCH 2)
banner.subtitle: Official Notice Inside — 7 Gulf Countries Affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. New dates to be announced after review on March 3.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

emirates.summary: Emirates has temporarily suspended all operations to and from Dubai due to multiple regional airspace closures, up to 15:00 UAE time on March 3. Customers can rebook for travel on or before March 20 or request refunds.

qatarAirways.summary: Qatar Airways flight operations remain temporarily suspended due to Qatari airspace closure. Next update due March 3 by 09:00 Doha time.

dxb.name: Dubai International Airport
dxb.summary: All flight operations are suspended until further notice. Passengers should not travel to the airport and should contact their airline.

dwc.name: Al Maktoum International Airport
dwc.summary: All flight operations are suspended until further notice. Passengers should not travel to the airport and should contact their airline.

doh.name: Hamad International Airport
doh.summary: Qatari airspace is closed and Qatar Airways operations are suspended until safe reopening is announced by Qatar Civil Aviation Authority.

advisories.title: CBSE: March 2 Middle East board exams postponed (7 countries)
advisories.summary: CBSE postponed Class 10 and 12 exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE; the situation will be reviewed on March 3 and new dates announced later.

advisories.title: Dubai Airports: DXB/DWC operations suspended until further notice
advisories.summary: Dubai Airports says all flight operations at DXB and DWC are suspended until further notice; passengers should not travel to the airport and should contact their airline for updates.

advisories.title: Qatar Airways: operations suspended; next update March 3 09:00 Doha
advisories.summary: Qatar Airways says flight operations remain temporarily suspended due to closure of Qatari airspace and will resume only after Qatar Civil Aviation Authority announces safe reopening; next update due March 3 by 09:00 Doha time.

indiaVisaHelp.title: FRRO: Visa extension assistance for foreign nationals in India
indiaVisaHelp.summary: Foreign nationals in India whose travel is affected should contact the nearest FRRO/FRO for visa or stay-related assistance.

disclaimer: This hub aggregates publicly available official information for Indian nationals. Always follow official advisories from MEA, Indian missions, airlines, and local authorities.
